prompt: Genera los tests unitarios para este servicio...

assertions.name: nested-class-per-method
assertions.text: Output contains at least one @Nested class

assertions.name: given-when-then-naming
assertions.text: Test method names follow Given_When_Then pattern (e.g., Given_ValidUserId_When_UserExists_Then_...)

assertions.name: all-branches-covered
assertions.text: Output covers all 3 branches: user not found, permission exists (update), permission not found (create)

assertions.name: no-complex-inline-construction
assertions.text: Complex DTOs (DevicePermissionData) are not constructed with inline setters — uses mocking, builders, or JSON fixtures
